skill.name: frontend-api-integration
skill.author: WebDev70
skill.description: Expert knowledge of frontend JavaScript for API integration including fetch/axios patterns, async/await error handling, form validation and submission, pagination implementation, loading states, DOM manipulation, event listeners, query parameter building, and vanilla JS best practices. Use when working with public/script.js, adding UI features, debugging client-side API issues, implementing forms, or managing client-side state.
